calendar.matters:
Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Apportionment Proceeding And For An Order To Distribute Settlement Funds
Off Calendar Aug-09-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Plaintiff's Notice Motion and Motion for Apportionment proceeding and for an Order to Distribute Settlement Funds Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields, CSR #7235.
Amir Sarreshtehdary, Esq. appeared for the plaintiff Carol Woodward, ind., as Wrongfull Death Heir, and as Successor in interest to Robert Woodward, Deceased. Also present in court Mary Frances; Thomas Michael Woodward and Dorothy Woodward.
After hearing the testimony from counsel and parties, the Court took the matter under submission, pending documents to be submitted by counsel (Declaration of Carol Woodward).
Proposed Order was submitted in open court.

08-09-11
Order granting motion for order to distribute settlement funds, signed by Judge Chaitin.
see scanned doc. for details of the Order.
